zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich I. von Sponheim-Heinsberg於1209年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次可茲納賀波斯朋海姆時，他的父親Gottfried III. von Sponheim33歲，母親Adelheid von Sayn25歲。他於大約1233年與Agnes von Kleve-Heinsberg在海因里希_海普洛文次海斯格結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1258年在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海斯格享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich I. von Sponheim-Heinsberg于1209年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次可茲納賀波斯朋海姆时，他的父亲Gottfried III. von Sponheim33岁，母亲Adelheid von Sayn25岁。他于大约1233年与Agnes von Kleve-Heinsberg在海因里希_海普洛文次海斯格结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1258年在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海斯格享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich I. von Sponheim-Heinsberg was born in 1209, in Burgsponheim, Kreuznach, Rhineland, Prussia, his father, Gottfried III. von Sponheim, was 33 and his mother, Adelheid von Sayn, was 25. He married Agnes von Kleve-Heinsberg about 1233, in Heinsberg, Rhineland, Prussia. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1258, in Heinsberg, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich I. von Sponheim-Heinsberg est né en 1209, à Burgsponheim, Kreuznach, Rhénanie, Prusse, son père, Gottfried III. von Sponheim, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Sayn, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Agnes von Kleve-Heinsberg environ 1233, à Heinsberg, Rhénanie, Prusse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1258, à Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich I. von Sponheim-Heinsberg 1209 in Burgsponheim, Kreuznach, Rheinprovinz, Preußen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gottfried III. von Sponheim 33 und seine Mutter Adelheid von Sayn 25. Er hat um 1233 in Heinsberg, Rheinprovinz, Preußen Agnes von Kleve-Heinsberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1258 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich I. von Sponheim-Heinsberg è nato il nel 1209 nel Burgsponheim, Kreuznach, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, il suo padre, Gottfried III. von Sponheim, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid von Sayn, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Agnes von Kleve-Heinsberg circa 1233, nel Heinsberg, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1258, nel Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich I. von Sponheim-Heinsbergが1209年にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズクレウズナチブルグスプオンヘイムで生まれた時，父Gottfried III. von Sponheimは33歳，母Adelheid von Saynは25歳であった。約1233年にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズヘインスバーグでAgnes von Kleve-Heinsbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1258年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンヘインスバーグで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich I. von Sponheim-Heinsberg(이)가 1209년 플레우ss 리인플로빈츠 크레우즈나치 버그스폰하임에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gottfried III. von Sponheim(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid von Sayn(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1233년 플레우ss 리인플로빈츠 하인스버그에서 Agnes von Kleve-Heinsberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1258년 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 하인스버그에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich I. von Sponheim-Heinsberg nasceu em 1209, em Burgsponheim, Kreuznach, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, seu pai, Gottfried III. von Sponheim, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Sayn, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes von Kleve-Heinsberg aproximadamente 1233, em Heinsberg, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1258, em Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich I. von Sponheim-Heinsberg родился в 1209 г. в местности бургспоним, креузнач, раинпровинз, Пруссия, его отцу по имени Gottfried III. von Sponheim было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Sayn, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes von Kleve-Heinsberg около 1233 г. в местности хаинсбирг, раинпровинз, Пруссия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1258 г. в местности хаинсбирг, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich I. von Sponheim-Heinsberg nació en 1209, en Burgsponheim, Kreuznach, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, su papá, Gottfried III. von Sponheim, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Adelheid von Sayn, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Agnes von Kleve-Heinsberg aproximadamente 1233, en Heinsberg, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1258, en Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, a la edad de 49 años.
